data.name: 催眠學習 —Secret Desire—
data.detailed_description:
遊戲特色：

  • 3位可攻略主角
  • 除了女主角以外，配角也有全程配音！
  • SF般的劇本，值得您細細品味！

故事大綱


主角「赤野聰一」是個不會讀書的吊車尾學生。

他因為考試的結果而與學生會長兼全校第一才女「姬宮月乃」起了爭執，
結果在眾人面前被甩了一巴掌。

雖然之後他奮發向上，試圖藉由提升成績來討回一口氣，
但因為生性怠惰，所以並沒有堅持太久。
他開始思考能輕鬆提升成績的方法，
然後買下了在購物網站上發現的「睡眠學習機」。

雖然抱持著半信半疑的態度，但在實際使用後，
卻得到了超乎想像的睡眠與學習效果，這讓他嚇了一跳。

最後他忘記了原本的目的，開始計畫將學習機用來做壞事。
而他的目標，就是那位高嶺之花──姬宮月乃……

登場人物



姬宮 月乃（Himemiya Tsukino）
傳統名門學府・三姬學園的2年級生。
是個對自己的智力和外表擁有絕對自信的學生會長，亦是個冷靜的美少女。
身爲校蕫會會長的女兒，爲了不被説成靠母親而平步青雲，
亦不想玷汙母親的名聲，她經常花心力讓自己的成績維持在資優生水平。
也是因為這樣，她非常討厭凡事都不努力的男主角。


姬宮 涼香（Himemiya Suzuka）
姬宮月乃的母親，也擔任主角們學校的校蕫會的會長。
作位一名自尊心很強的女性，她對人非常嚴謹。
在教育界方面亦是位權威，經常出現於電視節目中。
是個會不留情面，用正確的意見把對方從頭到尾批評一番的人。


藤井 奈月（Fujii Natsuki）
三姬學園的1年級生。她是男主角的同學，並擔任學生會的書記。
是位非常仰慕身爲學生會長・姬宮月乃的女生。
她因爲男主角拉低了全班的平均分破口大罵了他，
這情景剛好被月乃撞見，也就成爲整個故事的開始了。


世川 綾子（Sasakawa Ayako）
男主角的班主任。在三姬學園裏，是位很年輕的女教師。
但她也跟其他年長的教師一樣，是位做事非常守舊、不知變通的人。
對於數落了多次仍不知悔改的男主角，感到非常厭惡。

data.short_description: 由日本人氣廠商Dark One! 打造，一款備受矚目的校園冒險遊戲。討厭努力的劣等生赤野聰一在可疑的購物網站上買到了一台睡眠學習機。由於睡眠學習機有著超乎預期的睡眠和學習效果，赤野企圖用它來為學校的女學生和女老師灌輸知識……
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: Multi-core 1.0GHz+
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: VRAM 128MB+
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: PCM (DirectSound support)
  • 備註: 1280×720 display
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: Multi-core 2.0GHz+
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: VRAM 256MB+
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: PCM (DirectSound support)
  • 備註: 1280×720 or higher display

data.name: Saimin Gakushū: Secret Desire
data.detailed_description:
When the lovely Tsukino, student council president and the academy's star pupil, confronts serial slacker Soichi about his embarrassing grades, tempers flare and a very public argument ensues. In the heat of the moment, Tsukino slaps Soichi across the face, much to his humiliation.

At first, Soichi resolves to study harder if only to prove Tsukino wrong, but reality soon kicks in when he realizes he is unwilling to give up his lazy lifestyle. Looking to lifehack his way out of any actual effort, he purchases a "hypnology device" on a whim from an online shopping site.

Although skeptical at first, Soichi is surprised to learn that the device has a much more potent hypnotic effect than he could ever have imagined. Naturally, our hero scraps his original plans at once, instead devising a new plan to use the machine—with campus queen Tsukino as his first target.

FEATURES

  • A visual novel
  • Three branching heroine routes
  • Full Japanese voice acting by seasoned professionals

CHARACTER


Tsukino Himemiya
A second-year at the prestigious Mitsuki Academy, Tsukino Himemiya is a cool beauty who has complete confidence in her both her looks and her brains. As the daughter of the school's formidable chairwoman, she struggles to escape her mother's shadow, and avoid bringing shame to the family name. To this end, she works very hard to excel, and this leaves her with little feeling but spite for our slacker protagonist.


Suzuka Himemiya
Tsukino Himemiya's mother and the chairman of the academy that the protagonist attends. Very strict, and very prideful; as an authority in the field of education, she makes frequent appearances on television. She tears her enemies down with cold facts and hard logic.


Natsuki Fujii
Attending Mitsuki Academy as a first-year, Natsuki Fujii is a classmate of the protagonist. She greatly admires the student council president Tsukino Himemiya. The protagonist, on the other hand, she despises and mocks relentlessly for his habit of bringing down their whole class's averages. It's when Tsukino hears of this that our story begins...


Ayako Sasakawa
The head teacher of the protagonist's class, and one of the youngest female teachers at Mitsuki Academy, Ayako Sasaka is nonetheless as respected and feared as any of the more established educators. She has little sympathy for the protagonist, with whom her lectures tend to fall on deaf ears.

data.short_description: Saimin Gakushū is a school adventure visual novel by popular Japanese developers Dark One! Soichi Akano acquires a sleep-learning machine through a dubious online shopping site, and plans to imprint his knowledge on the female students and teachers at his school.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 8.1 / 10
  • Processor: Multi-core 1.0GHz+
  • Memory: 512 MB RAM
  • Graphics: VRAM 128MB+
  • DirectX: Version 9.0c
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: PCM (DirectSound support)
  • Additional Notes: 1280×720 display
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS *: Windows 8.1 / 10
  • Processor: Multi-core 2.0GHz+
  • Memory: 1 GB RAM
  • Graphics: VRAM 256MB+
  • DirectX: Version 9.0c
  • Storage: 3 GB available space
  • Sound Card: PCM (DirectSound support)
  • Additional Notes: 1280×720 or higher display
